honey: Oh good you’re all here. Thanksgiving tomorrow, four o’clock. Oh, guess who I invited. Remember that guy Will Colbert from high school?
Speaker 2: No.
honey: He was in Ross’s class…marching band…kinda overweight? Well, really overweight. I mean I was his thin friend.
Speaker 2: Wow! I don’t remember him. Honey, are you sure you’re not talking about your imaginary boyfriend.
honey: No that was Jarred! Wow! I haven’t thought about him in a long time… Anyway, umm Will’s, Will’s here on business and he didn’t have a place to go so I invited him here.
Speaker 2: Oh that’s nice.
honey: Oh, and by the way, he’s lost a bunch of weight. I mean he looks goo-ood! Okay, I mean really, really gorgeous! I still love Chandler.
Speaker 3: I just want you to say it once in a while.
